---
title: "Data Sources and Preparation"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-shell}

::: {.page-intro}
[Data]{.muted-label}

This page describes the datasets used in the project and the data preparation pipeline that transforms raw graph data into targeted CSV files for Tableau visualisation.
:::

```{=html}
<section class="section-card methodology-card">
  <h2>Original Data Sources</h2>
  <p class="methodology-lead">The original data source provided contains 2 CSV files made up of approximately 17,000 nodes and 37,000 edges. We used these CSV files for exploratory analysis and also utilised Python scripts to generate targeted CSV files for temporal analysis in Tableau.</p>

  <div class="source-grid">
    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Raw graph</span>
      <h3>MC1_graph.json</h3>
      <p>Complete graph of artists, genres, releases, and links.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Edges table</span>
      <h3>mc1_edges.csv</h3>
      <p>Relationship table for collaborations, influence, and band links.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Nodes table</span>
      <h3>mc1_nodes.csv</h3>
      <p>Entity table for artists, bands, releases, genres, and attributes.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Reference doc</span>
      <h3>VAST 2025 MC1 Data Description.docx</h3>
      <p>Schema reference for file structure, fields, node types, and edge types.</p>
    </article>
  </div>

  <a class="drive-card" href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1mfKNpFC0zFvP9mVG6L05X8QQdNyGdFnq?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="drive-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 87.3 78" role="img" focusable="false">
        <path fill="#0F9D58" d="M6.6 67.5 30.7 25.8h20.9L27.5 67.5z"/>
        <path fill="#FFC107" d="M56.6 67.5H27.5l24.1-41.7h29.1z"/>
        <path fill="#1976D2" d="M46.7 10.5 70.8 52.2 56.6 67.5 32.5 25.8z"/>
      </svg>
    </span>
    <span class="drive-card-copy">
      <span class="drive-card-label">Google Drive Repository</span>
      <span class="drive-card-title">Open shared project folder</span>
      <span class="drive-card-text">Access the dataset directory, Python scripts, supporting files, and working materials for the project.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
</section>

<section class="section-card methodology-card">
  <h2>Generated Data Sources</h2>
  <p class="methodology-lead">With such a large dataset, we utilised Python scripts to generate CSV files for targeted analysis. For each generated CSV, we used Tableau to create temporal visualisations rather than snapshot network analysis. The Python scripts can be downloaded from our project artefacts and include comments explaining what each script does. The table below maps each Python script to the CSV it generates and the corresponding methodology section.</p>

  <div class="source-grid source-grid--generated">
    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Influence Timeline</span>
      <h3>sailor_shift_inward_influence_timeline.csv</h3>
      <p>Generated from <code>extract_tableau_sailor_influence_timeline.py</code>. Used in <a href="methodology.html#temporal-stacked-bar-chart-of-sailor-shifts-inspirations">Section 3.2.1</a>.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Collaboration Timeline</span>
      <h3>tableau_sailor_collaboration_timeline.csv</h3>
      <p>Generated from <code>extract_tableau_sailor_collaboration_timeline.py</code>. Used in <a href="methodology.html#sailor-shift-collaboration-timeline">Section 3.3.2</a>.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Outward Genre Diffusion</span>
      <h3>tableau_oceanus_outward_genre_year.csv</h3>
      <p>Generated from <code>extract_tableau_oceanus_outward_genre_year.py</code>. Used in <a href="methodology.html#oceanus-folk-outward-diffusion-across-genres-timeline">Section 3.4.1</a>.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Outward Artist Influence</span>
      <h3>of_outward_influence_by_artist.csv</h3>
      <p>Generated from <code>extract_tableau_oceanus_outward_artist_year.py</code>. Used in <a href="methodology.html#top-artists-most-influenced-by-oceanus-folk">Section 3.4.3</a>.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="source-card">
      <span class="source-label">Inward Genre Evolution</span>
      <h3>tableau_oceanus_inward_genre_year.csv</h3>
      <p>Generated from <code>extract_tableau_oceanus_inward_genre_year.py</code>. Used in <a href="methodology.html#inward-evolution-of-oceanus-folk">Section 3.4.4</a>.</p>
    </article>
  </div>

  <a class="drive-card" href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1qIYVJlC53OkHSYCazWDLy4NCuLSGOeZB?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <span class="drive-icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 256 255" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="pyA" x1="12.96%" y1="12.07%" x2="79.69%" y2="78.21%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#387EB8"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#366994"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <linearGradient id="pyB" x1="19.13%" y1="20.58%" x2="90.43%" y2="88.01%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFE052"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFC331"/>
          </linearGradient>
        </defs>
        <path d="M126.916.072c-64.832 0-60.784 28.115-60.784 28.115l.072 29.128h61.868v8.745H41.631S.145 61.355.145 126.77c0 65.417 36.21 63.097 36.21 63.097h21.61v-30.356s-1.165-36.21 35.632-36.21h61.362s34.475.557 34.475-33.319V33.97S194.67.072 126.916.072zM92.802 19.66a11.12 11.12 0 0 1 11.13 11.13 11.12 11.12 0 0 1-11.13 11.13 11.12 11.12 0 0 1-11.13-11.13 11.12 11.12 0 0 1 11.13-11.13z" fill="url(#pyA)"/>
        <path d="M128.757 254.126c64.832 0 60.784-28.115 60.784-28.115l-.072-29.127H127.6v-8.745h86.441s41.486 4.705 41.486-60.712c0-65.416-36.21-63.096-36.21-63.096h-21.61v30.355s1.165 36.21-35.632 36.21h-61.362s-34.475-.557-34.475 33.32v56.013s-5.235 33.897 62.518 33.897zm34.114-19.586a11.12 11.12 0 0 1-11.13-11.13 11.12 11.12 0 0 1 11.13-11.131 11.12 11.12 0 0 1 11.13 11.13 11.12 11.12 0 0 1-11.13 11.13z" fill="url(#pyB)"/>
      </svg>
    </span>
    <span class="drive-card-copy">
      <span class="drive-card-label">Python Scripts</span>
      <span class="drive-card-title">View all extraction scripts</span>
      <span class="drive-card-text">All Python scripts used to generate the CSV files above are available on Google Drive with inline comments.</span>
    </span>
  </a>
</section>
```

:::
